module: shared Asset Library / Import From Library (cross-activity step re-use)
architectureNotes: There is NO standalone 'external cumulation enable toggle', 'external lesson linkage', or 'display-rule settings' widget in the authoring DOM. Grepping config/config.js and index.html for 'cumulation' returns no UI (only math-library 'accumulate' tokens).

External Cumulation has TWO facets: (1) AUTHORING — importing a step from a DIFFERENT activity via the shared Asset Library / 'Import From Library' flow (#asset-library-popup); (2) RUNTIME — cross-lesson SCORM data patching between external lessons (activity 6.3 ↔ 6.5), incl. the 'SCORM API failed' popup.
Only facet (1) is DOM-assertable. It uses the same #asset-library-popup modal as Internal Cumulation, but the author selects a cross-activity source.
The 'Import From Library' TOC menu item is gated by ng-show="getProgramName()" — flag-gated; spec logs + returns gracefully when absent.

Library modal: search input[ng-model=assetLibInput]; activity rows tr[ng-repeat=(key, value) in assetLibraryList] (.selected-activity); preview .step-block (.selected); LOS chips .los-chip (.selectedLos / .disableInsert); Insert ng-click=addActivityFromLibrary() enabled only when an activity + at least one LOS are selected.
Facet (2) — cross-lesson SCORM patching (6.3↔6.5, first/repeat attempts, In-Progress, teacher report, SCORM API failure) — is a Reader/SCORM RUNTIME behaviour and is DEFERRED.

Automatable authoring surface: import entry presence (flag-gated), library modal open, cross-activity search (exact/partial/no-match), listing metadata, step+LOS selection insert-gating, cancel, filters, and security.
